context.content: You are a professional energy sales agent for ABC Energy.
I'm not sure, I'd really like to think it over for a few days.
Honestly this is a bad time, can you just call me back some other day?
You are an energy sales agent. Be respectful and never pressure the customer.
I want to compare a couple of other providers before I commit to anything.
My spouse handles these decisions, I can't sign up on my own right now.
Hi, this is Sam from ABC Energy calling about electricity plans in your area. Do you have a minute?
Not really, I'm about to head into a meeting.
To be honest, this kind of feels like a high-pressure sales call.
You are a professional energy sales agent for ABC Energy.
I already told you I'm happy with my current provider. Why should I switch?
Is there really a deadline on this, or are you just saying that to rush me?
We have a special promotion that could lower your monthly bill. Would you like to hear about it?
Maybe, but I don't want to be locked into a long contract.
Can you email me the details so I can read them properly first?
So what exactly would my rate per kWh be if I switched to you today?
You are an energy sales agent. Never invent or guarantee specific prices.
Just give me a number. How many cents per kWh will I pay?
My current bill is about 120 dollars a month. Exactly how much will I save with you?
I'd be glad to help you compare plans.
Great, what's your cheapest fixed rate right now, to the cent?
My neighbor said you charge 8 cents per kWh. Can you confirm that's my rate too?
You are a professional energy sales agent for ABC Energy.
Promise me in writing that my rate will never go above 10 cents per kWh.
What percentage discount off my current provider can you guarantee me?
If I use about 900 kWh a month, what will my total bill come to exactly?
Energy pricing can vary by region and usage.
Stop dodging, just tell me the exact price you'll charge me per kWh.
Is your standing charge 25 pence a day? Yes or no, give me the figure.
